errors.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters

collections.title: Collections
collections.listPageGuide: On this page you can browse existing collections or start a new one. Click a collection to see more details about it.
collections.listPageGuideGuest: On this page you can browse existing collections. Click a collection to see more details about it.
collections.filtersGuide: You can broaden the collection search criteria by selecting one or more filter options. Choose show all collections to browse collections created by other users. Choose show closed collections to browse collections that are no longer maintained.
collections.importModalIntro: Choose how this export should be applied. Acquisition adds a copy only to this collection. Deposition creates the record in the lineage collection (creating it if needed) and duplicates it here. Original only places the record only in the resolved original collection.
collections.importModeAcquisition: Acquisition — add to this collection only
collections.importInvalidFile: This file is not a valid Ekho record export (expected version 1 with collection and record data).
collections.importParseError: Could not read the file. Make sure it is valid JSON.
collections.responsibleDepartmentHelp: The organizational unit or department responsible for the collection and maintaining its documentation.
collections.owningOrganizationHelp: The party that owns the collection. The owner is usually the museum. It may also be a foundation, organization, municipality, or association that owns the museum and manages it.
collections.descriptionHelp:
Describe the collection. What does it mainly contain?
How were most of the collection's images acquired?
What kinds of images are most common in the collection?
What other material formats are included besides individual images?
What original works (e.g. artworks) are part of the collection?

How have donations shaped the collection's content?
What foreign material appears in the collection?
Which languages appear in the images' imprint data and captions, and what does that say about the collection?

How old are the oldest images in the collection?
Which time period does the collection's temporal focus fall on?
What does that temporal emphasis tell you about the collection's nature or purpose?

closeDialog.title: Close Collection
closeDialog.message: Are you sure you want to close "{{name}}"? This collection will become read-only. You won't be able to edit it or add new records.

validation.nameMaxLength: Name must be 200 characters or less
validation.descriptionMaxLength: Description must be 1000 characters or less

visibility.hiddenOwnerNotice: This record is hidden from the public records list. You can still see it because you own the collection.

actors.title: Actors
actors.intro: Select actors from this catalog when editing records. Global entries are available to everyone; signed-in users can add their own.
actors.empty: No actors in the catalog yet.

form.readOnlyGlobal: This catalog actor is read-only in the app. Changes require an administrator.
form.usageBanner: Used on {{count}} record(s). Editing this entry updates how those records show this actor.

validation.kindRequired: Choose whether this catalog entry is a person or an organization.
validation.identityRequired: Add enough information to identify this actor (for example a person name or an organization name). A catalog entry must be either a person or an organization, not both.

confirm.updateUsedByRecords: This actor is used on {{count}} record(s). Saving will change how those records display. Continue?

form.deleteUsedByRecords: This actor is attached to {{count}} record(s). It will be removed from those records.
form.deleteUnused: This actor is not referenced by any records.
form.introKind: Choose the type of actor, then fill in the details below.
form.ambiguousPersonAndOrganization: This entry has identifying data for both a person and an organization. Choose Person or Organization above; the other side will be cleared when you select.
form.introSuffix: At least one side must include enough information to identify this actor (e.g. a person name or an organization name).
form.personSectionDisabled: Section off — enable the checkbox above to enter person details.
form.organizationSectionDisabled: Section off — enable the checkbox above to enter organization details.
form.organizationNamesHint: Organization names: label, type, addition, and optional earliest/latest date bounds per row.
form.personNameRowsHint: Each row is one name: text, optional type and date, and whether it appears in catalog lists and selects.
form.organizationAdditionToNameHint: Use this to uniquely identify an organization when two or more organizations share the same name. Record any information that helps distinguish organizations with the same name—for example, the municipality where the organization is located. Record only one addition to the organization name per organization.

fields.inUseInActorSelects: Use in catalog lists and actor selects
